text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll just put these documents for Shakur over on
this table.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... I should air out this room a little.
Woosh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ack?! No, th-the documents are flying away?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wait, please! D-don't go away! Come baaack!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The heck are you doing? Does this look like
a dance studio to you?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm really s-sorry! All your documents were blown
away when the wind came in...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't expect to get them back prancing around
like that. Move your body with intention and
precision!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeek! I'm s-s-sorry my movements are so sloppy!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Then fix them. Doto, do exactly as I say!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The wind is flowing in from the southeast at a
speed of three meters a second. Adding the
current location of the papers in my equation
would bring...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Make a dash for it on my count! Three,
two, one—go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, h-here goeees!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Good, that's one down. On to the next!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I want you to run all the way there!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, o-okay!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! It's time for the finisher, Doto. Four
seconds from now, you need to dive in for a
catch! Ready?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Oof?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I see you caught the last one with your face and
not your hands. Your minimal effort somehow
achieved the maximum result.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I feel like my movement has improved!

The following day, I notice Meisho Doto's running
form has sharpened!
